svg.title: usesteady: kill mid-run → resume
svg.desc: UseSteady survivability demo: 01-kill-mid-run — animated terminal recording rendered as deterministic SVG. Reproduce: node scripts/p2-render-demo-assets.mjs
svg.text: File note: If users.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If orders.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If reports.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If README.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
$ # === Simulate interruption: workflow was killed after task 2/4 ===
$ # (token truncated to completed_task_count=2; tasks 3 and 4 rolled back)
$ # Resume from the token. No hidden state; just point at the file.
File note: If reports.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
File note: If README.md already exists, the operation will fail (target_exists).
